content: What are the best cherry pick asset considering a profit in 3 weeks? Perform a deep verification making sure that has high probability of making profit. Consider ETFs for this analysis and Perform a chain of reaction to validate your answer, then use the https://polymarket.com to access probalities of the future events

args.thought: Planning the analysis: 1) Check Polymarket for prediction market probabilities on key 3-week catalysts (CPI print, Fed decisions, market direction). 2) Cross-reference with current ETF positioning, valuations, and technical setups. 3) Build chain of reaction stress test for top candidates. 4) Be intellectually honest - no "high probability" exists, but I can identify best risk/reward based on implied probabilities vs. market pricing.
